phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main shopping street is
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la principale rue commerçante ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah prahn-SEE-pal roo ko-mair-SAHNT
phrases.cultural_note: Rue de la Liberté is the main shopping street in Dijon, connecting Place Darcy to the historic center.

responses.english: It's Rue de la Liberté, the one you're on.
responses.phonetic: say lah roo duh lah lee-bair-TAY, sel oo voo ZET
responses.french: C'est la rue de la Liberté, celle où vous êtes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find luxury boutiques
phrases.text_local: Où sont les boutiques de luxe ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay boo-TEEK duh LOOKS
phrases.cultural_note: High-end shops line Rue de la Liberté and the adjacent Rue des Forges. For luxury brands, try the Golden Index.

responses.english: Around Place François Rude, on this street.
responses.phonetic: oh-TOOR duh lah plahs frahn-SWAH ROOD, dahn set ROO
responses.french: Autour de la place François Rude, dans cette rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest pharmacy is
phrases.text_local: Où est la pharmacie la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah far-mah-SEE lah ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Pharmacies in France display a green cross. There's one on nearly every major street in the city center.

responses.english: Look for the green cross, there's one just over there.
responses.phonetic: shair-SHAY lah krwah VAIRT, eel ee ahn ah oon zhoost lah-BAH
responses.french: Cherchez la croix verte, il y en a une juste là-bas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours for shops
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures d'ouverture des boutiques ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz UHR doo-vair-TYOR day boo-TEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Shops in Dijon typically open around 9am and close around 7pm, with a break for lunch between 12pm and 2pm.

responses.english: Shops in Dijon typically open around 9am and close around 7pm, with a lunch break between 12pm and 2pm.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.french: Les boutiques à Dijon ouvrent généralement vers 9h et ferment vers 19h, avec une pause déjeuner entre 12h et 14h.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are any sales today
phrases.cultural_note: French sales (soldes) are regulated — they happen twice yearly, in January and late June/early July. Outside these periods, prices are fixed.

responses.english: Sales are in January and July only.
responses.phonetic: lay SOHLD son ahn zhahn-VYAY ay ahn zhwee-YAY suhl-MAHN
responses.french: Les soldes sont en janvier et en juillet seulement.
